ops.title: Migrate existing fleet .claude/settings.json files to cc-guides json fragments
ops.description: Per repo: deep-diff the current .claude/settings.json against merge(cc-skills:settings-base, cc-skills:settings-<lang>); residue (extra keys/array elements/scalar overrides) becomes local.fragment.json in a .claude/fragments/.claude/settings.json/ layout dir; verify merge(shared…, local) is semantically equal to the current file (one-time reorder-only diff acceptable); empty-residue repos get a two-line layout. Blocked by: fleet pull-model sweep + plugin/guides/json settings fragments + repo-bootstrap v0.41.0 (which establishes the scaffold shape).

ops.text: Each migrated repo's .claude/settings.json is rendered by cc-guides (registered in its cc-guides.lock artifacts) and semantically identical to its pre-migration content
A settings change committed to cc-skills plugin/guides/json propagates to a migrated repo via its daily re-render without manual edits
